title: Started Catalogue Write Service Extraction
summary: Added `scripts/catalogue/catalogue_write_service.py` and routed the first low-risk Local Studio catalogue endpoints through callable service functions instead of the legacy in-process HTTP handler.
effect: Local Studio no longer constructs a fake `catalogue_write_server.Handler` for delete preview, scoped build preview/apply, moment preview, prose import preview/apply, or moment import preview/apply. Core catalogue mutations remain on the legacy handler pending smaller extraction slices.
